title: BetterPvPplus
description: This mod adds new custom weapons, shields and items with unique textures and models. It is currently in beta, so some features may change or contain bugs. Feel free to send me a message with feedback, suggestions, or issues you find so I can improve it.
body: This mode is designed to rework PvP it adds new daggers and shields made of iron and other minerals Ce mode est conçu pour repenser le JcJ ; il ajoute de nouvelles dagues et de nouveaux boucliers en fer et autres minéraux
